text:
[Requirements]
Goal:           Review the changed files before commit or PR.
Inputs:         Base ref:       origin/main
                Base commit:    4c8d9ab
                Diff scope:     4 changed files
Constraints:    Diff-only review, no repo-wide release audit.
Assumptions:    Current branch diff is the intended review target.
Open questions: None.

Proceeding with the three PR QA review tracks.

input.prompt: PR QA track: general code review.
PR QA track: test quality review.
PR QA track: silent failure review.
